title: Loop not processing all items due to MySQL node output
symptom: The workflow is designed to loop through Facebook ad accounts, but it stops processing before reaching all items, specifically at 35 accounts without any error message.
applies_when: Using a loop to process items
MySQL node is part of the workflow
not_this_if: The loop processes all items correctly
The MySQL node outputs all expected data
root_cause: The MySQL node may not be returning data for all items, which can cause the loop to terminate prematurely. If the node outputs fewer items than expected, the loop will stop processing further items.
fix_steps: Set the option to 'Always Output Data'
Run the workflow again to check if all items are processed
agent_instruction: Configure the MySQL node to always output data and save the workflow.
